wilderness.text: Nothing but wilderness here. Quiet. Too quiet.
Just trees, grass, and wind. Need to keep moving before the cold sets in.
A good place to build a new colony. Solid resources.
Nature is reclaiming everything. What's the point of fighting it?
I can't feel my legs. Starvation is eating me from the inside.
My joints are freezing. I need shelter immediately.

urban_ground_zero.text: I'm navigating the ruins of ${settlementName}. Spores drift lazily through the stagnant atmosphere. I have a terrible feeling about this place.
Ground zero: ${settlementName}. Decimated, infected. Keep my hand on my weapon.
This place is crawling with infection. High risk, high reward.
God, the smell of rot... Vostok is a tomb. I shouldn't be here.
If I die here, let it be quick.

urban.text: I'm walking through the remnants of ${settlementName}. Before the collapse, this area housed ${population} people. Now, nature is slowly reclaiming the structures.
Strolling through ${settlementName}. Abandoned cars, empty windows. A tomb of concrete and asphalt.
Lots of structures to salvage in ${settlementName}. Good potential.
Visions of the crowd that once lived in ${settlementName}... makes my chest tight.
Too many dark alleys. Perfect spot for an ambush.

food_fresh.text: Found some fresh ${itemName}. Real food! It's a miracle it hasn't spoiled.
A pack of fresh ${itemName}. This will keep my stamina up.
Fresh ${itemName}. I should share this with the others.

food_stale.text: Some stale ${itemName}. A bit hard, but still edible. Can't afford to be picky.
This ${itemName} is stale, but it beats starving.

food_spoiled.text: This ${itemName} is spoiled. Might give me stomach cramps, but I might have no choice.
Spoiled ${itemName}... and my stomach is already empty. This is going to hurt.

food_rotten.text: This ${itemName} is rotten. Disgusting. I'll get sick if I eat this.
Rotten ${itemName}. Completely inedible. Waste of space.
It's rotten, but... I am so hungry. Maybe just a bite?

food_unrecognizable.text: This ${itemName} is completely unrecognizable. Moldy mush. Trash.

weapon.text: Found a ${itemName}. Good, I need something to defend myself.
A ${itemName}. This will keep the walkers at a distance.
Scavenged a ${itemName}. My chances of survival just went up.
This ${itemName} will do some serious damage.

medicine.text: Scavenged some ${itemName}. Medical supplies are worth their weight in gold.
Some ${itemName}. Keep this in my first-aid pack. Might save my life.

clothing.text: Found a ${itemName}. Good for insulation and protection.
This ${itemName} will keep me warm in the cold nights.

generic.text: Found a ${itemName}. Let's see if I can find a use for this.
Scavenged ${itemName}. Might be useful for crafting or trading.

freezing.text: It's freezing out here. My breath is turning to ice. Need shelter.
Bitter cold. Fingers are getting numb. I need a fire.
Cold is cracking my skin. This hypothermia is going to kill me.

cold.text: Chilly wind today. Keep my jacket zipped up.

warm.text: Nice and warm. A rare calm day in this ruined world.
The temperature is comfortable. Ideal for scavenging.

hot.text: Sweltering heat. I'm sweating through my clothes. Need water.
Too hot out here. The sun is beating down on me.

rain.text: Rain is picking up. Damp clothes make you cold fast. Need cover.
Drizzling. Everything is slick and mud is forming.

snow.text: Snow is falling. Covers the tracks, but freezes the bones.
Winter is here. The snow makes everything silent, and deadly.

morning.text: Sunrise. I made it through another night.
Morning light. Time to pack up and start scavenging.

day.text: Broad daylight. Keep my head down. Easier to spot danger now.
Midday. Need to watch my water supply.

evening.text: Sun is setting. Light is fading. Need to find a place to hole up.
Dusk. The shadows are getting longer. The dead will be active soon.

night.text: Pitch black. I can hear things moving in the dark. Keep quiet.
Night. Cold and terrifying. Praying I wake up tomorrow.
Darkness... a comfortable blanket. Stealth is easier now.

survivor_death: Simulation Event: connection with survivor ${survivorName} lost. Cause: ${cause}.
${survivorName} has ceased vitals. A quiet death in a loud world. Continuing manager sequence.
The board reports: ${survivorName} did not survive ${cause}.
settlement_collapse: Simulation Update: settlement ${settlementName} population collapsed. Lost ${populationLoss} survivors.
${settlementName} overrun. The remaining settlement statistics have been updated.
meta_threat: Alert: Hostile movement detected in sector ${sectorId}. Survivors are currently unaware.
Warning: Ambush potential high near coordinates [${x}, ${z}].
